# unifi_dpi_application_category (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi DPI application category by numeric `id` or `name`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a DPI application category by numeric identifier.
data "unifi_dpi_application_category" "business_tools" {
  id = 5
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
